findings.title: Disabled TLS certificate verification
findings.evidence: The raw diff adds `rejectUnauthorized: false` to the `https.Agent` constructor. This disables certificate validation for all HTTPS requests using this agent, making the sync script vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks. The Diff Drift report independently flags the same change at high severity with the same code evidence.

notes: The branch name `agent/fix-sync-timeouts` suggests this change was made to work around TLS-related connection timeouts, but disabling certificate verification is not an acceptable fix — proper remediation would be supplying the correct CA bundle or fixing the server certificate configuration.
Only one file was changed and analyzed; no skipped-file caveats apply here.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
